{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323191501E12224F6C8E0B58B785F"}"},"total":40},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7510408715668505368","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"可以的，视角新颖，和别的水浒有不一样的观看体验"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1748659995,"group_id":"7481633549477497881","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0aKkagT/V3l0HZmyEs+yBwRWrkAIXpz5EiP2zDkzcTY","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"1626870751177316","user_name":"昊天皓天"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1626870751177316","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7481633549477497881","book_info":{"abstract":"架空宋朝—架空历史—穿越太子—无系统—无金手指—部分情节话中话—有谋略—腹黑
孤儿大学生赵松一觉醒来，竟然穿越到了宋朝！并且，穿越到了端王长子的身上！而随着端王登基，七岁的赵松也被立为太子！
赵松一想到，未来即将发生的靖康之耻，可能又要多一个自己，便苦恼万分！
看着文强武弱的大宋朝堂，赵松感到一阵无力，索性直接摆烂，开始享福起来！
赵松更是计划享福几年，等到了靖康之耻时，自己便服毒自杀。
可是，这一切的一切，在赵松前往殿帅府找高俅踢球时，发生了改变！
赵松遇见了水浒传中的人物——禁军教头王进！
从这一刻起，赵松才明白，自己这是一个拥有水浒好汉的世界！
赵松仿佛看到自己未来的结局发生了改变！
收服所有江湖绿林好汉、征讨失地、治国开明、扬华夏天威的千古帝王登场了！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dc5995b0bc7e5ff7b64f124f4d0eb3f6","author":"葫芦一三","author_id":"","book_id":"7481633549477497881","book_name":"穿越大宋成为太子，打造最强大宋","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#404848","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4321人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":92,"name":"腹黑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=92&name=腹黑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":498,"name":"皇帝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=498&name=皇帝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":501,"name":"宋朝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=501&name=宋朝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7481640269813662233","read_count":"4321","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"732545"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.4","serial_count":"310","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,腹黑,皇帝,宋朝","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/2903410d4cbc7e4aab103b509770b039~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779448501&x-signature=3drxR3aSlm2BmrhK%2BpBUSFjH%2F%2BU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"96716102198","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"117"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323191501E12224F6C8E0B58B785F"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读10小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":34887,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":35624,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":2022},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7496134635183866686","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"逻辑可以
看完之后，在其他的书友段评，顿时茅塞顿开起来！
这逻辑确实没有问题哈！
主角是端王时候的长子，而宋徽宗从端王登基称帝的时候，正好（历史上的宋钦宗赵桓出生了）赵桓出生了！按照古人迷信的思想，确实会有所想法。
小说中，蔡京的挑事完全在理。
逻辑性可以，值得长久的看"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1745333684,"group_id":"7481633549477497881","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5TEXWFXdp3UHx7adtWuBjo=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/5c79ad96d58d46b7b4f6f9e173a47ae1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792219&x-signature=9bDLhxJhFzWirjkjBQA%2FzaWJJKU%3D","user_id":"968042298478475","user_name":"亲戚说这些"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"968042298478475","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7481633549477497881","book_info":{"abstract":"架空宋朝—架空历史—穿越太子—无系统—无金手指—部分情节话中话—有谋略—腹黑
